item.title: Version 0.0.36
item.description: - Fixed intermittent Dock icon hang/context-menu regressions on the default `activateApp -> active-app App Exposé` path by hardening click lifecycle recovery in `DockExposeCoordinator` and `DockClickEventTap`. - Added explicit stale Exposé tracking expiry/cleanup and deferred active-click `App Exposé` triggering safeguards to prevent collapsed or missed invokes during repeated cycles. - Added `scripts/automated_default_active_app_expose_stress.sh` for deterministic real Dock-click stress validation of the default active-app App Exposé workflow.
